core_principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix 'Performance Pro' athleticism with 'Swiss' precision.
Emotion First: The CRM must feel 'Fast' and 'Authoritative'. No lag, no clutter.
Content is King: Data is the hero. Remove all unnecessary chrome/borders.
Negative Space: Use 'p-6' or 'p-8' padding to let data breathe.
Contrast: High contrast for readability. Vital for sales data.
anti_patterns: Inter for Headings (Use Plus Jakarta Sans)
Gradient Overload (Keep it flat and clean)
AI Slop: Generic rounded corners everywhere (Use tighter radii for precision)

rules: Data tables must use 'Inter' with tabular-nums feature for alignment.
Labels must be uppercase, text-xs, font-bold, tracking-wider.

containers.pipeline_column: bg-slate-50/50 min-w-[300px] w-[300px] rounded-xl p-4 border border-slate-100 h-full flex flex-col
containers.pipeline_card: bg-white p-4 rounded-lg border border-slate-200 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-all cursor-grab active:cursor-grabbing mb-3

buttons.primary: bg-slate-900 text-white hover:bg-slate-800 shadow-sm h-10 px-4 py-2 rounded-md font-medium transition-all active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-slate-900 border border-slate-200 hover:bg-slate-50 shadow-sm h-10 px-4 py-2 rounded-md font-medium
buttons.ghost: hover:bg-slate-100 hover:text-slate-900 text-slate-600 h-10 px-4 py-2 rounded-md font-medium
buttons.destructive: bg-rose-600 text-white hover:bg-rose-700 shadow-sm h-10 px-4 py-2 rounded-md font-medium

cards.default: rounded-xl border border-slate-200 bg-white text-slate-950 shadow-sm

inputs.default: flex h-10 w-full rounded-md border border-slate-200 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-white file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-slate-500 focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-slate-950 focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

guidelines: Transition: 'transition-all duration-200 ease-in-out' for simple hover states.
Pipeline Drag: Smooth layout animations using 'framer-motion' LayoutGroup.
Micro-interactions: Buttons scale down to 0.98 on click.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text is slate-600 or darker on white backgrounds.
accessibility.focus_states: Visible focus rings (ring-2 ring-slate-950) are mandatory.
accessibility.aria: All interactive elements must have aria-labels if no text is present.

universal_guidelines: Do not use generic 'AI slop' rounded corners (use consistent radii).
Avoid gradients for backgrounds unless it's a subtle 'noise' texture.
Data-testid attributes are mandatory for all interactive elements.
Tables should have sticky headers and row hover effects.
Sidebar should be collapsible to maximize workspace.
instructions_to_main_agent: 2. Configure Tailwind colors to match the 'Performance Pro' palette.
3. Build the 'Dashboard' using the Bento Grid strategy.
4. Implement the 'Kanban Board' with drag-and-drop (use @hello-pangea/dnd or dnd-kit).
5. Ensure the 'Reports' page uses Recharts with the specified minimal theme.
